title: Combat oracle shots_fired_total/hits_landed_total have no retail-equivalent accumulator read ares-side

history.note: Native reads shot regs + a player-hit counter; ares emits 0. Locate/read the retail equivalents to close.

FID-0032 verify capture (dam_forward_stop): shots_fired_total and hits_landed_total both 0/0 on both sides all 138 frames (no shooting on this route) so no divergence surfaced. Disposition: hits_landed_total has NO retail-equivalent accumulator — it is the native trace-only running counter s_traceGuardHitEventCount (port_trace.c:1725 region), so there is nothing to read ares-side; structurally NOT closable by address mapping (dossier combat_oracle_fields.md §3/§5 documents this as divergence-by-construction). shots_fired_total COULD be derived ares-side by summing the per-weapon N64 shot registers (native shots.total), but those addresses are not in the in-tree symbol set and validation needs a shooting route. Both need a combat/shooting route + (for shots) US shot-reg addrs. Left open; hits_landed_total may warrant reclassification to documented (no retail equivalent) rather than instrumentation-gap.

Now EXERCISED by combat route dam_combat_guard6: combat.shots_fired_total diverges 198 field-hits (native counts 7 shots, ares emits 0). Confirms disposition: shots_fired_total needs US per-weapon shot-register addrs (not in-tree); hits_landed_total remains a native-only counter with no retail accumulator (documented gap, not closable by address mapping). Left triaged.
